column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-charts (charts-01 … charts-11).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only — the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step READ) and decides. Structural rules that
# grep cannot express (containment, gate-scope) live in ast-grep/*.yml (tier 2).

column4: INVENTED Charts API (does not exist) → Chart { BarMark/LineMark/PointMark/SectorMark } ; PieMark→SectorMark, ColumnMark→BarMark, ScatterMark→PointMark

version-floored Charts symbol — vectorized plots (LinePlot/AreaPlot/BarPlot/PointPlot/SectorPlot/RectanglePlot/RulePlot) = iOS 18, above the iOS 17 floor; REPORT only if deployment target < 18 and the call is ungated (read floor in ORIENT). VERIFY gated #available(iOS 18, *) and NOT over-gated above the real floor. SectorMark/chart*Selection are iOS 17 = at the floor → a gate on them is the OVER-gating defect.

possible HAND-ROLLED bar/line chart — if a ForEach of Rectangle/Capsule sized by a data value (or GeometryReader proportional bars), prefer Chart { BarMark } (charts-02). If Canvas-drawn, cross_ref drawing-canvas.
Mark present — confirm it FITS the data: BarMark=categorical/discrete, LineMark/AreaMark=continuous time-series trend, PointMark=scatter (charts-03).
Chart present — confirm axes are legible: add .chartXAxis/.chartYAxis when the default ticks are wrong/cluttered (charts-04).
multi-series encoding — a legend should identify series; confirm a legend shows (.chartLegend not hidden) (charts-05).
hardcoded per-mark color — if one color is repeated per category, prefer .foregroundStyle(by: .value(...)) for an auto palette + legend (charts-06). cross_ref appearance-color.
hand-rolled hit-testing on a chart — for value selection prefer .chartXSelection/.chartAngleSelection (iOS 17, at the project floor), not manual tap math (charts-07).
macOS-arm gate at a Charts floor in an iOS target → gate on #available(iOS 16/17/18, *) (wrong-arm, charts-09, fix_mode: auto). Confirm it scopes a Chart symbol.
Chart present — confirm a VoiceOver descriptor: .accessibilityLabel/.accessibilityValue per mark or a chart-level summary (charts-11). cross_ref accessibility (keep-both).

large series — thousands of marks from one array render slowly; on iOS 18 prefer LinePlot/AreaPlot (vectorized, gate above the iOS 17 floor) or .chartScrollableAxes (iOS 17, at floor) + downsampling (charts-10). cross_ref view-performance.
